## Testing

<!--
  Examples:
  - `pnpm test` (added X new tests)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Updated docs / `.env.example` if behaviour or env vars changed
- [ ] Added or updated a CHANGELOG entry under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or `.env` files in the diff
